description: Cat in a Dogs World (MEW) emerged in 2024 on Solana as a defiant feline memecoin challenging the dominance of dog-themed tokens. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 MEW gives MEW holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning MEW into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Cat in a Dogs World
